channel.title: Leadership Coaching on Integral Leadership Design
channel.description: Recent content in Leadership Coaching on Integral Leadership Design

item.title: Individual Leadership Coaching
item.description:
Leadership doesn’t develop in a vacuum. It develops through reflection, challenge, and the kind of honest conversation that’s hard to have inside your organization. That’s what individual coaching provides — a dedicated space to work on yourself as a leader, with someone who has no agenda other than your growth.

Eighty percent of Fortune 500 companies now offer executive coaching to their leaders. The reason is straightforward: when a leader improves, their entire team and organization benefits.

item.title: Single Strategy Session
item.description:
Not every leadership challenge requires a months-long engagement. Sometimes you need clarity on one specific situation — a difficult conversation you’ve been avoiding, a career decision with real consequences, a team dynamic that’s gotten away from you, or a moment of transition that needs a clear head and an honest outside perspective.

That’s what a Single Strategy Session with Alexandra is for.

What It Is

A focused, 90-minute one-on-one session conducted via video conference. You bring the situation. Alexandra brings twenty-five years of leadership coaching experience, deep listening, and the ability to ask the questions that cut through the noise.

item.title: Women's Leadership Program
item.description:
Women bring enormous leadership potential to their organizations. Too often, that potential goes underdeveloped — not for lack of ability, but because the environments, expectations, and support systems women navigate are genuinely different from those of their male peers.

Alexandra Salamis has spent her career working at that gap. Her signature program — Purpose, Passion, and Presence for Women Rising — was designed specifically for women who are ready to lead with confidence, authenticity, and real impact.
